falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout from long-term support would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 300% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme volume would indicate forced buying or institutional participation, contradicting the 'UNKNOWN' phase assumption of indecision

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day RSI crosses above 70 while price makes a new 3-month high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bullish momentum phase, directly contradicting the pattern's 83% similarity to a bottom formation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
